task.title: Service Deployment and Configuration
task.description: Create Kubernetes manifests and deploy notification router service

implementation.details:
1. Create Dockerfile with multi-stage build
2. Build Kubernetes Deployment manifest
3. Configure Service and optional Ingress
4. Add ConfigMap for environment variables
5. Set up horizontal pod autoscaling

decision.description: Initial replica count and scaling thresholds

task.acceptance_criteria: Service deploys successfully, health checks pass, scales based on load, accessible via Kubernetes service
